recommendations.title: The Girl with the Needle
recommendations.overview: Struggling to survive in post-WWI Copenhagen, a newly unemployed and pregnant young woman is taken in by a charismatic elder to help run an underground adoption agency. The two form an unexpected bond, until a sudden discovery changes everything.

recommendations.title: Mother and Child

recommendations.title: Private Life
recommendations.overview: Richard and Rachel, a couple in the throes of infertility, try to maintain their marriage as they descend deeper and deeper into the insular world of assisted reproduction and domestic adoption.

recommendations.title: The Tribe
recommendations.overview: A cleaner woman with vocational street dancer tries to recover her long-stranded son that she gave for adoption, a former CEO who lost everything, including his memories.

recommendations.title: Wake Wood
recommendations.overview: The parents of a girl who was killed by a savage dog are granted the opportunity to spend three days with their deceased daughter.

recommendations.title: In Safe Hands

recommendations.title: Patrik, Age 1.5
recommendations.overview: Göran and Sven have been cleared for adoption and they have a possibility to adopt a swedish orphan, Patrik 1,5. But when Patrik arrives he turns out to be someone else, not the little boy they were expecting. A comma had been misplaced, and in comes

recommendations.title: Dear Santa
recommendations.genres: Family, Comedy, Drama, Romance, TV Movie
recommendations.overview: Crystal, a rich party girl, finds a little girl's letter to Santa asking for a new mother, and she vows to win over the father and daughter before the holidays.
